title: P28 queue status report
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'P27B':
        task['status'] = 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD'
    if task.get('id') == 'P28':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:18:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
done = [t for t in queue.get('tasks', []) if str(t.get('status','')).startswith('DONE')]
pending = [t for t in queue.get('tasks', []) if t.get('status') == 'PENDING']
in_progress = [t for t in queue.get('tasks', []) if t.get('status') == 'IN_PROGRESS']
state = Path('governance/state/P28_CONSOLIDATE_CURRENT_QUEUE_STATUS.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P28','trace_id':'p28_consolidate_current_queue_status','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'done_count':len(done),'pending_count':len(pending),'in_progress_count':len(in_progress),'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'P28B record P28 result and close current queue or load new tasks'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P28_CONSOLIDATE_CURRENT_QUEUE_STATUS.md')
report.write_text('# P28 | Consolidate current queue status\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\n## Queue summary\nDone-like: ' + str(len(done)) + '\nPending: ' + str(len(pending)) + '\nIn progress: ' + str(len(in_progress)) + '\n\n## Tasks\n' + json.dumps(queue.get('tasks', []), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n\nWorkflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: P28B record P28 result and close current queue or load new tasks.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
